rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 10, 2022 line 1. Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is DENIED without prejudice. Pursuant to Civil Code 8488(a), at the hearing both (1) the petition and (2) the issue of compliance with the service and date for hearing requirements are deemed controverted by the claimant. The petitioner has the burden of proof as to the issue of compliance with the service and date for hearing requirements. Petitioners failed to comply with Civil Code 8486(a). The Petition was filed on February 18, 2022. Petitioners filed a Notice of Hearing on March 9, 2022 with a hearing date of April 11, 2022- a date more than 30 days after the filing of the petition. Petitioners failed to comply with Civil Code 8118(b). There is no declaration containing documentation showing that payment was made to mail the notice using certified mail, or any other type of documentation of the sort. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: WENDY HEMMING VS. PARCEL F OWNER LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Response To Admission No 11
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 10, 2022 line 2. PLAINTIFF WENDY HEMMING, WENDY HEMMING Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Response To Admission No 11 is DENIED. The initial response was literally true as to the point in time when her admission was made. However, the admission does not preclude her from introducing evidence that at a different point in time windows did exist on the north wall. An RFA should not be used as a device to hide or confuse issues. See Burch v. Gombos (2000) 82 Cal.App.4th 355, 359-361. See also Frederich v. Kontos Industries, Inc. (1987) 189 Cal.App. 274. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. rulings.Case Title: JUAN HERRERA VS. JUAN MANUEL FRIAS DIOSDADO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Breach Of Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 10, 2022 line 3. PLAINTIFF JUAN HERRERA Notice And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Breach Of Settlement Agreement is DENIED without prejudice. No proof of service showing that Defendants were served (POS only shows Ms. Chung was served, who is not listed as attorney of record for defendants). Further, it appears there are still pending applications for rental assistance filed by Defendants. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
